1. This database includes all known coal terminals with a capacity of 1 million tonnes or more. Smaller terminals are only included at discretion.
Terminals that have been permanently shut down.
Terminals that have been formally commissioned or that have entered commercial operation.
Terminals that have been deactivated or put into an inactive state but are not retired.
Projects where physical construction has begun.
Projects officially shelved by a sponsor, or that show no activity over a period of 2 years.
Projects officially cancelled by a sponsor, or that show no activity over a period of 4 years.
Projects announced or in planning, but not yet under physical construction.
Million tonnes
